title: A sighting that ended the UFO skepticism of a witness in Curitiba-PR [1994]

text_preview:
MARCH 17th, 1994. Time: 22:00. Duration: 2 hours. When riding in her car on Avenida Erasto Gaertner, in Curitiba, State of Paraná, and then at her home, a woman spotted two unidentified flying objects hovering above the two airports in Curitiba. The UFOs observed with a spyglass seemed to have three points, and seen with the naked eye they looked like stars.

According to the witness who reported the sightings, there were 7 more people watching the 2 unknown objects in the sky. According to her, the size of the UFOs were “a little bigger than an airplane”, and their colors were “silver with re
summary: On March 17, 1994, eight witnesses in Curitiba-PR observed two silver UFOs hovering over both airports for 2 hours, converting a skeptic into a believer.
